title: राधा कवचम्
devanagariText:
॥ श्री राधा कवचम् ॥

ॐ अस्य श्री राधा कवचस्य ब्रह्मा ऋषिः।
गायत्री छन्दः। श्री राधिका देवता।
श्री राधा प्रीत्यर्थं जपे विनियोगः॥

राधा मे पातु शीर्षं च ललाटं वृषभानुजा।
नेत्रे कृष्णप्रिया पातु श्रवणे गोपिकेश्वरी॥ १॥

नासिकां राधिका पातु वदनं माधवप्रिया।
कण्ठं गोपालवल्लभा स्कन्धौ ब्रजेश्वरी तथा॥ २॥

भुजौ कृष्णानुरागिणी करौ वृन्दावनेश्वरी।
हृदयं रासमण्डलप्रिया कुक्षिं हरिप्रिया॥ ३॥

कटिं गोकुलसुन्दरी जानुनी यमुनातटा।
जङ्घे प्रेमस्वरूपिणी पादौ राधारमणप्रिया॥ ४॥

सर्वाङ्गं श्रीमती राधा पातु प्राच्यां हरेःप्रिया।
आग्नेय्यां कृष्णसम्पत्तिः दक्षिणे ब्रजसुन्दरी॥ ५॥

नैर्ऋत्यां रासविलासिनी पश्चिमे वंशीप्रिया तथा।
वायव्यां गोपिकारत्नं उत्तरे प्रेमदेविका॥ ६॥

ऐशान्यां किशोरी पातु ऊर्ध्वं राधा सनातनी।
अधः पातु महालक्ष्मी सर्वत्र राधिका ऽवतु॥ ७॥

y इदं कवचं दिव्यं राधायाः परमात्मनः।
पठेद् भक्त्या सदा मर्त्यः सर्वसिद्धिमवाप्नुयात्॥ ८॥

॥ इति श्री राधा कवचम् सम्पूर्णम् ॥
transliteration:
|| Shri Radha Kavacham ||

Om Asya Shri Radha Kavachasya Brahma Rishih |
Gayatri Chhandah | Shri Radhika Devata |
Shri Radha Prityartham Jape Viniyogah ||

Radha Me Patu Shirsham Cha Lalatam Vrishabhanuja |
Netre Krishnapriya Patu Shravane Gopikeshvari || 1 ||

Nasikam Radhika Patu Vadanam Madhavapriya |
Kantham Gopalavallabha Skandhau Brajeshvari Tatha || 2 ||

Bhujau Krishnanuragini Karau Vrindavaneshvari |
Hridayam Rasamandalapriya Kukshim Haripriya || 3 ||

Katim Gokulasundari Januni Yamunatata |
Janghe Premasvarupini Padau Radharamanapriya || 4 ||

Sarvangam Shrimati Radha Patu Prachyam Hareh Priya |
Agneyam Krishnasampatih Dakshine Brajasundari || 5 ||

Nairityam Rasavilasini Pashchime Vamshipriya Tatha |
Vayavyam Gopikaratnam Uttare Premadevika || 6 ||

Aishanyam Kishori Patu Urdhvam Radha Sanatani |
Adhah Patu Mahalakshmi Sarvatra Radhika Avatu || 7 ||

Ya Idam Kavacham Divyam Radhayah Paramatmanah |
Pathed Bhaktya Sada Martyah Sarvasiddhim Avapnuyat || 8 ||

|| Iti Shri Radha Kavacham Sampurnam ||
hindiMeaning:
श्री राधा कवच — सभी अंगों और दिशाओं की रक्षा के लिए।

मस्तक की रक्षा राधा करें, ललाट की वृषभानुजा, नेत्रों की कृष्णप्रिया।

हृदय की रक्षा रासमण्डलप्रिया करें, सर्वांग की श्रीमती राधा।

सभी दिशाओं में कृष्णसम्पत्ति, ब्रजसुन्दरी, रासविलासिनी, गोपिकारत्न रक्षा करें।

इस दिव्य कवच को भक्ति से पढ़ने वाला सर्वसिद्धि प्राप्त करता है।
benefits: Divine armor of Shri Radha for complete spiritual protection
Invokes 108 names of Radha across body and directions
Grants divine love (prema) and devotion to Radha-Krishna
Bestows all siddhis and spiritual fulfillment
Essential for Radha Ashtami and Holi celebrations
description: The Radha Kavacham, known in Sanskrit as राधा कवचम्, is a divine armor prayer for protection in praise of Goddess Radha. This sacred composition is sourced from Brahmavaivarta Purana and continues to inspire devotees worldwide. Devotees recite this prayer to bestow all siddhis and spiritual fulfillment and invoke 108 names of Radha across body and directions. It is also said to grant divine love (prema) and devotion to Radha-Krishna. This sacred text is ideally recited on Wednesday (Budhvar) and Friday (Shukravar) and during Radha Ashtami and Holi for enhanced blessings. At 8 verses long, the recitation takes roughly 4 minutes, making it accessible for regular devotional use. On this page, you can read the complete Radha Kavacham in Devanagari Sanskrit with English transliteration, Hindi meaning (arth), and free PDF download for offline recitation.
seoDescription: Read Radha Kavacham in Sanskrit with Hindi meaning. Divine armor of Shri Radha for spiritual protection, divine love and devotion.
